evidence_summary: Establish the biological stakes of the Martian environment through the discovery and subsequent destruction of a Warhoon incubator. The sequence must transition from quiet tactical observation to sudden, violent chaos.
The party discovers a Warhoon incubator containing green Martian eggs. In an act of sabotage or defense, the incubator is destroyed, highlighting the high stakes of the Martian biological cycle.
The party approaches the intact incubator site in a state of high alertness.
The group stands amidst the debris and shattered remains of the incubator.
Discovery of the eggs followed by the sudden destruction of the incubator.
